message:
fix: Handle union types and struct comparison in assertIs

- Use std.meta.eql for struct types in assertIs (structs don't support == in Zig)
- Check for .@"union" instead of .@"struct" for PickleValue bool comparison
  (PickleValue is union(enum), not struct)

This fixes test_bool.py which uses assertIs with pickle.loads() results.

test_bool.py: 284 tests pass
test_int.py: 219 tests pass
test_tuple.py: 31 tests pass
test_augassign.py: 15 tests pass
